candidates.reason: Abandoned after EXP exposed a legacy movie/TV catalog identity binding defect.
Abandoned after EXP catalog recovery exhausted its 64 MiB SQLite temp filesystem and the candidate masked SQLITE_FULL.
Abandoned after restrictive-umask testing exposed bind-mounted fixtures that were unreadable to unprivileged validation containers, requiring a harness source change.

Superseded after MediaNAS proved that Docker normalizes MemorySwap to -1 on a zero-swap host, causing this source's validators to reject the documented safe fallback; replacement source c7b6deff54a78ede279d607e38bfe8df2bec3582 accepts that fallback only when host SwapTotal is zero.
